title.zh: 基于内存的Shiro框架Webshell攻击研究
title.en: Memory-Based Webshell Attack Research on Shiro Framework

description.zh: 研究Shiro框架基于内存的Webshell攻击，包括Tomcat冰蝎内存马注入原理与实现。
description.en: Research on memory-based Webshell attack for Shiro framework, including Tomcat Behinder memory shell injection principle and implementation.

content.zh: 部署方式：IDEA tomcat调试部署、docker-compose部署、Docker+IDEA组合
content.en: Deployment methods: IDEA tomcat debug deployment, docker-compose deployment, Docker+IDEA combination

content.zh: IDEA调试配置：在catalina.sh中添加CATALINA_OPTS开放5555调试端口
content.en: IDEA debug config: Add CATALINA_OPTS in catalina.sh to open 5555 debug port

content.zh: 内存马注入：使用冰蝎2_Tomcat工具，POST发送p、path、dy参数，通过rememberMe Cookie触发反序列化注入
content.en: Memory shell injection: Use Behinder 2_Tomcat tool, POST p, path, dy parameters, trigger deserialization via rememberMe Cookie

content.zh: 注入原理：通过反射获取StandardContext，动态创建Servlet Wrapper并添加到容器中
content.en: Injection principle: Get StandardContext via reflection, dynamically create Servlet Wrapper and add to container
